# FICI Shoes - Premium Leather Footwear
# Website: https://www.ficishoes.com
# Location: Ambur, Tamil Nadu, India
# GST: 33BMAPM8509H1Z4

## About
FICI Shoes by NMF International is a premium leather footwear brand based in Ambur, Tamil Nadu, India. With over 10 years of heritage in leather craftsmanship, we specialize in handcrafted leather shoes, sandals, and boots for men and women.

## Products
- Formal leather shoes (lace-ups, slip-ons)
- Chelsea boots
- Leather chappals and sandals
- Customizable leather footwear
- Height-increasing shoes (Celby brand)

## Services
- Direct factory-to-customer wholesale pricing
- Customization options for fit and style
- All-India shipping
- Easy returns and exchanges
- Secure payment options (Razorpay, Cash on Delivery)

## Contact
- Phone: +91 81220 03006
- Email: Available through website contact form
- Address: Ambur, Tamil Nadu, India
- Website: https://www.ficishoes.com

## Business Details
- Company: NMF International
- Brand: FICI Shoes
- GST: 33BMAPM8509H1Z4
- Location: Khaderpet, Ambur, Tamil Nadu, India
- Established: 2020

## Key Features
- Premium milled leather
- Traditional Ambur craftsmanship
- Quality assurance with rigorous checks
- Affordable wholesale pricing
- Customer satisfaction focused
- Authentic leather manufacturing

## Categories
- Men's formal shoes
- Women's leather footwear
- Custom leather shoes
- Office footwear
- Professional shoes
- Traditional leather sandals
